Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg take on Martina Frantova and Christine Karges in this Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal match at the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With fast-paced exchanges, sharp angles, and tactical precision, both teams battle for a spot in the finals on the prestigious Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida. This high-stakes match features standout teamwork and thrilling rallies from some of the sport’s most skilled competitors.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges
US Open 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Semifinal – Courter & Humberg vs Frantova & Karges

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: Scott Crandall & Jose Derisi taking on Stefan Andren & Rick Witsken for Bronze Medal in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal

Video.summary: Experience the thrilling showdown at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships as twin brothers Hunter Johnson and Yates Johnson face off for the very first time in the men's pro singles gold medal match. Both top seeds with years of experience playing doubles together, these brothers bring a unique dynamic filled with expert strategy, rapid exchanges, and emotional rivalry. From early leads and tactical shot-making to late-game drama and camaraderie, watch Hunter and Yates battle it out point by point in a historic and captivating final. Featuring expert commentary and insights into their playing styles, this match is a must-watch for pickleball fans everywhere.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Video.summary: Watch Jennifer Dawson battle it out for gold against Leslie Bernard in this Women's Senior Pro Singles match at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2023.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Singles - Gold

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Singles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Singles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Singles - Gold

Video.summary: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Video.summary: Heisman Trophy winning quarterback Danny Wuerffel & Pickleball pro Kyle Yates compete against US Olympian Casey Patterson & Pickleball pro Chuck Taylor in the final game of Picklebowl 2022.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 4

Video.summary: It's Pickleball pro Matt Manasse & NFL Quarterback Drew Brees versus Pickleball Pro Lew Halski & former NFL player Matt Stinchcomb.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2

Video.summary: Straight from The Orchard at Jigsaw Health, Tuesday Night Pickleball brings you a high-octane women’s doubles matchup featuring four elite pros. Anna Bright and Jessie Irvine team up with firepower and finesse to take on the seasoned duo of Lucy Kovalova and Catherine Parenteau.From smart stacking and sharp cross-court dinks to quick hands battles and momentum swings, this match is packed with elite-level tactics and crowd-thrilling rallies. It’s classic TNP: fun, fiery, and full of flair.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Video.summary: The Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a critical Day 4 clash between the Rajasthan Titans and the league-leading Chennai Super Champs. Entering the tie as heavy favorites, coach Johnny Goldberg’s Chennai squad looks to solidify their top spot on the leaderboard. Meanwhile, the Rajasthan Titans, led by coach Leigh Whitwell, are desperate to find their rhythm and climb the points table after a challenging start to the season.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's a "Terrific Tuesday" at the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Day 5 features a critical matchup between the Bengaluru Jawans and the Delhi Dilwale. The stakes are high: Delhi, currently number five on the points table, has a chance to move to number three if the results go their way, while Bengaluru looks to bounce back from a recent loss.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
